mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_guide WHERE status = 1
AND game_id = #{gameId}
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, tags)
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT g.*, ga.name AS game_name, u.nickname AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM t_guide g LEFT JOIN t_game ga ON g.game_id = ga.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE g.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_guide (game_id, user_id, title, summary, content, tags, cover, status) VALUES (#{gameId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{tags}, #{cover}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_guide SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_guide SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_guide SET comment_count = comment_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT g.*, ga.name AS game_name, u.nickname AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM t_guide g LEFT JOIN t_game ga ON g.game_id = ga.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE g.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY g.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_guide WHERE user_id = #{userId}
